Video.summary: The hilarious spoof "Went With The Wind!" is presented for your entertainment. Dinah Shore guest stars.
Video.title: Dinah Shore

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard & Steve Lawrence star. Featuring the movie spoof "Operation Minestrone" & "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Kaye Ballard, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Jack Weston and Michele Lee join for a sketch juxtaposing couples. Also: a doctor's visit is an emotional.
Video.title: Jack Weston, Michele Lee

Video.summary: Andy Griffith & Barbara McNair star. Featuring a coach who brings work home, & a number about Smokey The Bear.
Video.title: Andy Griffith, Barbara Mcnair

Video.summary: Guest stars Bing Crosby and Paul Lynde take a trip to Canoga Falls in tonight's "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Carol struggles with "Easy Open" packaging, Harvey & Tim spoof Jacques Cousteau, and Carol & Vicki are torn.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry & Eydie Gorme salute to RKO Pictures. And tax time is stressful for Harvey in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Ken Berry, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Guest Neil Sedaka joins the gang for a set of commercial parodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns for his eleventh and final season premiere guest star spot!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Martha Raye guests, appearing in "Carol & Sis" as an Irish maid. Harvey fantasizes about being a matador.
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Cass Elliot and Ricardo Montalban guest. Cass joins a sketch about wallflowers, Ricardo takes a playboy role.
Video.title: Ricardo Montalban, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars in a take-off on film "Double Indemnity"..here named "Double Calamity", with Carol too.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Carol & Harvey are quarreling dolls in "Barby and Ben". Carol takes aim with spoof, "Rancid Harvest."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Comedian Scoey Mitchell and singer Bobbie Gentry are Carol's guests for "The Queen Elizabeth Show."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Scoey Mitchell, Bobbie Gentry

Video.summary: As The Oldest Conductor, Tim Conway leads the Sydney Orchestra.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous

Image.alt: Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray appears on "As The Stomach Turns." Also featured: "Carol & Sis" go gaga over Roger's briefcase.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Paul Lynde plays a smarmy insurance salesman, and later appears on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dyan Cannon, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray and Steve Lawrence guest star in an episode saluting Columbia Pictures classic movies.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in the soap opera spoof "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Carol's guests are Mickey Rooney and John Davidson!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters join Carol in a rockin' musical spoof of "Cinderella" in tonight's episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Lily Tomlin & Steve Lawrence star! Lily plays a prison matron while Steve plays a crime boss on his honeymoon.
Video.title: Lily Tomlin, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Carol and the gang take their act across the pond for this special episode filmed in London!
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray & Joan Rivers guest! Featuring Rivers' comedy, a "V.I.P." interview, and a talk show segment.
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Lucille Ball and Mel Torme spoof the classic comedy "Some Like It Hot" with a gender-flipping twist.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Rita Moreno guest stars as a nurse to the accident-prone Carol. Also featured: Tim as a hapless officer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Rita Moreno

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as the teacher of Eunice and Bubba in "The Family." Also: a remodeled kitchen falls apart.
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Rock Hudson and Nancy Walker join Carol and company for sketch entitled: "When My Baby Laughs At Me."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Rock Hudson, Nancy Walker

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Steve Lawrence appear in commercial spoofs. Tim plays The Oldest Man and is in a pantomime.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin and Lana Turner guest. Gorshin does impressions, then joins Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Don Adams guest stars. Don plays a talk show host, Carol's husband in "The Lost Purse," and a griping father.
Video.title: Don Adams

Video.summary: Guest George Gobel joins a "V.I.P." interview of a Duke and Duchess. A "Carol & Sis" sketch is also a prank.
Video.title: George Gobel

Video.summary: Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr accept Carol's mission: appear in "Mission: Improbable"...which includes a cameo!
Video.title: Flip Wilson, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, and Nancy Wilson all appear as guests on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Video.summary: Lucille Ball and George Carlin guest! Lucy and Carol play flight attendants, and George serves up stand-up.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby guest, featuring a toy ad and a court sketch. It's poker night on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby
